summary: Comprehensive audit of ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE wellness platform complete. All 13 backend API tests PASSED. All critical frontend features verified working: Observatory Orrery with 8 planets rendering and clickable, Deep Sky stars loading, Live Events with moon phase, Crystal Mint Panel opens from Cosmic Ledger, all navigation buttons functional.

issues: Route /trade shows 404 - correct route is /trade-circle. Bottom nav 'Trade' button correctly navigates to /trade-circle

critical_code_review_comments: Observatory Orrery FIXED - planets now render correctly with get_current_user_optional auth
Observatory returns 8 planets with correct data (hz, color, orbital_speed, distance_au, light_time_minutes)
Observatory Deep Sky tab shows 10 notable stars with light-time explorer
Observatory Live Events shows moon phase (Waning Crescent) and upcoming celestial events
Main Brain status returns SUPERCONDUCTING with 9x9 lattice (81 nodes)
Wellness Zones API returns 3 zones as expected
Crystal Mint Panel opens from Cosmic Ledger with L2 Fractal GPU Shader rendering
All bottom navigation buttons work: Hub, Trade, Oracle, Discover, Mixer
All top navigation buttons work: Archives, Journal, Ledger
SmartDock is hidden on Hub page (by design per SmartDock.js line 127)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive audit complete. Observatory Orrery fix verified - planets now render correctly. All navigation working. Crystal Mint Panel opens from Cosmic Ledger. SmartDock hidden on Hub/intro/auth pages by design.
